problem:
Find the curve defined by the equation
\[r = 4 \tan \theta \sec \theta.\](A) Line
(B) Circle
(C) Parabola
(D) Ellipse
(E) Hyperbola

Enter the letter of the correct option.

classified_questions.question: How can we rewrite the equation in terms of trigonometric functions?
classified_questions.label: b
